notes: The Net Worth screen now matches the rest of the app: every asset, share, debt and loan row, the sort pill, back button and add form all carry the same soft gradient border and card background used everywhere else, instead of the old flat grey boxes.

That same treatment now runs through the whole app for consistency: settings panels, cloud sync and restore point cards, budget cards and totals, profile and category rows, import summaries and the setup wizard all share one card style. Rows that use a coloured border to show state (open editors, debts, the selected profile or account) keep it.
